youtube_media.title: Thor vs Colton | Which Deadlift Is Best?
youtube_media.summary:
Hafthor Bjornsson and Colton Engelbrecht  are the 2 best Deadlifters in the world but who holds which record? Let's clear it up!

TIMESTAMPS BELOW 
0:00 - SPS Intro
0:23 - New Powerlifting WR
0:35 - 520KG Deadlift Review
1:20 - 2 WR Deadlifts side by side
1:31 - Strongman Deadlift rules
1:55 - 510kg WR review
3:50 - Who was lifting more fresh?
5:35 - Colton hand injury
5:55 - Colton 500kg no straps
6:11 - Solutions!
9:58 - Age difference
10:35 - Final thoughts

#thorbjornsson #coltonengelbrecht #deadliftrecord #strongman #powerlifting #deadlift #mattrhodessport #mattrhodes

youtube_media.title: EVW 23: Devon vs Vitaly… But Here’s How The Whole Card Plays Out
youtube_media.summary:
EVW 23 is stacked—and Devon Larratt vs Vitaly Laletin is just the headline.
In this video, Monster Michael Todd breaks down the entire East vs West 23 card and gives his real predictions match by match.
From the main event to the sleeper matches, here’s how he sees it playing out.

Drop your full card picks in the comments—who do you have winning?

00:16 Duvan vs André

07:40 Artur vs Mindaugas

09:17 Dave vs Ivan
